title: Itanagar、Arunachal Pradesh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Itanagar、Arunachal Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Itanagar是Arunachal Pradesh的一個城市，人口約60,000。The capital of Arunachal Pradesh, a scenic city in the Himalayan foothills known for its tribal culture and ancient Ita Fort.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
